channel.title: GitHub Rust Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: meilisearch/meilisearch
item.description: A lightning-fast search API that fits effortlessly into your apps, websites, and workflow

item.title: biomejs/biome
item.description: A toolchain for web projects, aimed to provide functionalities to maintain them. Biome offers formatter and linter, usable via CLI and LSP.

item.title: fish-shell/fish-shell
item.description: The user-friendly command line shell.

item.title: GreptimeTeam/greptimedb
item.description: An open-source, cloud-native, unified time series database for metrics, logs and events with SQL/PromQL supported. Available on GreptimeCloud.

item.title: web-infra-dev/rspack
item.description: The fast Rust-based web bundler with webpack-compatible API 🦀️

item.title: mainmatter/100-exercises-to-learn-rust
item.description: A self-paced course to learn Rust, one exercise at a time.

item.title: rerun-io/rerun
item.description: Visualize streams of multimodal data. Free, fast, easy to use, and simple to integrate. Built in Rust.

item.title: TabbyML/tabby
item.description: Self-hosted AI coding assistant

item.title: bevyengine/bevy
item.description: A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

item.title: tokio-rs/axum
item.description: Ergonomic and modular web framework built with Tokio, Tower, and Hyper

item.title: embassy-rs/embassy
item.description: Modern embedded framework, using Rust and async.

item.title: apache/datafusion
item.description: Apache DataFusion SQL Query Engine

item.title: pola-rs/polars
item.description: Dataframes powered by a multithreaded, vectorized query engine, written in Rust

item.title: influxdata/influxdb
item.description: Scalable datastore for metrics, events, and real-time analytics

item.title: neondatabase/neon
item.description: Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

item.title: MystenLabs/sui
item.description: Sui, a next-generation smart contract platform with high throughput, low latency, and an asset-oriented programming model powered by the Move programming language

item.title: rust-lang/mdBook
item.description: Create book from markdown files. Like Gitbook but implemented in Rust

item.title: lancedb/lance
item.description: Modern columnar data format for ML and LLMs implemented in Rust. Convert from parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

item.title: anoma/namada
item.description: Rust implementation of Namada, a Proof-of-Stake L1 for interchain asset-agnostic privacy

item.title: huggingface/text-embeddings-inference
item.description: A blazing fast inference solution for text embeddings models

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: cloudflare/pingora
item.description: A library for building fast, reliable and evolvable network services.
